0x00001000: 0x00000013    # nop
0x00001004: 0x06400293    # addi x5, zero, 100
0x00001008: 0x00028313    # mv   x6, x5
0x0000100C: 0x06400393    # li   x7, 100
0x00001010: 0x00012437    # li   x8, 0x12345
0x00001014: 0x34540413    # li   x8, 0x12345
0x00001018: 0x0000006F    # j    skip
0x0000101C: 0x3E700493    # addi x9, zero, 999
0x00001020: 0xFFF00513    # li   x10, -1
0x00001024: 0x00000593    # li   x11, 0
0x00001028: 0x7FF00613    # li   x12, 2047
0x0000102C: 0x80000693    # li   x13, -2048
0x00001030: 0x00001737    # li   x14, 2048
0x00001034: 0x80070713    # li   x14, 2048
0x00001038: 0x00ABD7B7    # li   x15, 0xABCDEF
0x0000103C: 0xDEF78793    # li   x15, 0xABCDEF
0x00001040: 0x00A00293    # li   t0, 10
0x00001044: 0x01400313    # li   t1, 20
0x00001048: 0x006283B3    # add  t2, t0, t1
0x0000104C: 0x00038513    # mv   a0, t2
0x00001050: 0x00000013    # nop
